### Release Notes

<details>
<summary>godbus/dbus (github.com/godbus/dbus/v5)</summary>

### [`v5.2.2`](https://redirect.github.com/godbus/dbus/releases/tag/v5.2.2)

[Compare Source](https://redirect.github.com/godbus/dbus/compare/v5.2.1...v5.2.2)

#### What's Changed

- Drop ununsed import in windows specific code by [@​dims](https://redirect.github.com/dims) in [#​427](https://redirect.github.com/godbus/dbus/pull/427)

#### New Contributors

- [@​dims](https://redirect.github.com/dims) made their first contribution in [#​427](https://redirect.github.com/godbus/dbus/pull/427)

**Full Changelog**: <https://github.com/godbus/dbus/compare/v5.2.1...v5.2.2>

### [`v5.2.1`](https://redirect.github.com/godbus/dbus/releases/tag/v5.2.1)

[Compare Source](https://redirect.github.com/godbus/dbus/compare/v5.2.0...v5.2.1)

#### What's Changed

- ci: bump freebsd to 14.3 by [@​kolyshkin](https://redirect.github.com/kolyshkin) in [#​421](https://redirect.github.com/godbus/dbus/pull/421)
- Allow more than 32 containers / struct fields in a signature by [@​guelfey](https://redirect.github.com/guelfey) in [#​426](https://redirect.github.com/godbus/dbus/pull/426)
- Bump golangci-lint to v2, fix some issues found by [@​kolyshkin](https://redirect.github.com/kolyshkin) in [#​419](https://redirect.github.com/godbus/dbus/pull/419)
- Fix and simplify getHomeDir by [@​kolyshkin](https://redirect.github.com/kolyshkin) in [#​422](https://redirect.github.com/godbus/dbus/pull/422)

**Full Changelog**: <https://github.com/godbus/dbus/compare/v5.2.0...v5.2.1>

</details>
